/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/TCPServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/UserManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/ClientSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/Handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/src/MessageDispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Server.dir/home/user/PROJECTS/common/PacketIO.cpp.o -o Server  -lpqxx -lpq -lcrypto
